hooks.command: if [ -n "${HOME:-}" ]; then case ":$PATH:" in *":$HOME/.local/bin:"*) ;; *) export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" ;; esac; fi; repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || { echo "shipit: tool guard could not locate the git checkout root — refusing the tool call rather than allowing an unchecked coordinator edit." >&2; exit 2; }; pixi run --manifest-path "$repo/pixi.toml" -- "$repo/bin/shipit" hook pretooluse; rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then echo "shipit: tool guard could not run (rc=$rc) — refusing the tool call rather than allowing an unchecked coordinator edit. Likely causes: the session cwd is not inside a shipit checkout, pixi is not installed, or the pinned shipit environment could not be resolved. Install pixi (https://pixi.sh) if it is missing, then run this command from the project to see the underlying error: pixi run --manifest-path \"$repo/pixi.toml\" -- \"$repo/bin/shipit\" hook pretooluse" >&2; exit 2; fi; : "shipit hook pretooluse"
